name: WorkspaceSummary
description: Provides a high-level overview of the workspace: directory tree, entry points, core service descriptions, and recent file modifications.

function.name: workspace_summary
function.description: Generate a high-level overview of the codebase including directory tree, key entry points, core service responsibilities, and recent changes. Use this to gain context quickly at the start of a task.

depth.description: Maximum depth of the directory tree (default: 3).

recent_limit.description: Number of recently modified files to show (default: 10).
